# Unified Delivery Traceability Matrix

**Document ID**: TRACEABILITY-MATRIX
**Version**: 10.0
**Date**: 2026-03-11
**Generated By**: Claude (Release Engineer)
**Covers**: All FRs (FR-001 through FR-136, FR-030-01 through FR-030-19), NFRs (QW-1 through QW-5, ME-1 through ME-9, LE-1 through LE-3, D-5 through D-7, NFR-017-01 through NFR-017-06, NFR-018-01 through NFR-018-06, NFR-019-01 through NFR-019-04, NFR-021-01 through NFR-021-03, NFR-022-01 through NFR-022-03, NFR-023-01 through NFR-023-02, NFR-030-01 through NFR-030-10), DIST (FR-DIST-01 through FR-DIST-09)

## Legend

| Symbol | Meaning |
|--------|---------|
| Ôťů | Fully covered ÔÇö source files and tests exist |
| ÔÜá´ŞĆ | Partially covered ÔÇö source exists but tests are missing or indirect |
| ÔŁî | Missing ÔÇö no source or test coverage found |
| N/A | Deprecated or abandoned ÔÇö requirement no longer applies |
